title: Hyperlink Internal vs External
author: m-chaitra-15
body:
[Documentation](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs?tab=readme-ov-file#hyperlink-value) says hyperlinks starting with `#` are considered as Internal links. However in [this](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/master/lib/xlsx/xform/sheet/hyperlink-xform.js#L48) part of the code isInternalLink function checks for altogether different pattern to decide if the passed target is internal or external.

This is causing our hyperlinks to not work properly. 
Another issue noticed is when location attribute is set we see the hyperlink url to be set incorrectly.
ex: hyperlink set in code: `#Sheet2!A1` , but ehat we see in the sheet is `#Sheet2!A1##Sheet2!A1`.

`nameHeaderCell.value = {
        text:'sometext',
        hyperlink: #Sheet2!A1,
        tooltip: 'some Tool Tip',
      };`

the url set in excelsheet is `#Sheet2!A1##Sheet2!A1`
